---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}


##  ``Sprint#11: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture IV`` (February 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| **11**  | 38 | 23/02/2026 | - Sprint#11: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture IV </br></br>  - ApartmentPredictor: </br> (1) Base Project Backend Spring Boot </br> (2) API Rest </br> (3) H2 DB Local & JPA </br> (4) `Apartment` <-> `Review` <-> `Reviewer`  </br> (5) `Apartment` <-> `School` </br> (6) `Apartment` <-> `Contract` <-> `Owner`  </br> (7) `Person` Inherence with `Owner` / `Reviewer` </br> (8) Implementing & Testing PRA#02 II </br> (9) Postman: testing **assign features**  </br></br>  - JPA: Cascade, fetch, `EAGER`/`LAZY`, etc </br></br> - Architecture-Top9 Patterns   | - [ApartmentPredictor: d456471c](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/d456471c5df25de1a5c08b5e1bf4436485bea5c4){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Postman: apartmentPredictorCRUD](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/7473960/2sBXVeFs8L#12cbfc18-54ab-406e-a6c0-620c12afc6a7){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [PRA#02: Java UML + Implementation + H2 Data Population](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/PRA/PRA%2302_Java_UML_Implementation.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/pra02-2.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> </br> - [Spring Boot: JPA Inherence](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/boot-concepts-jpa-5.html#table_per_class){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [JPA Relationships Guide](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA_Relationships_Guide.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Lab#8-4, jpa-relationships](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/sblab8-4.html#jpa-relationships){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [CACAJEC](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA_RelationshipsImplementation_Rule.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Architecture-Top9 Patterns](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/Architecture-Top9_Patterns.md){.external target='_blank'} |
|   | 39 | 24/02/2026 |  - ApartmentPredictor: </br> (1) Base Project Backend Spring Boot </br> (2) API Rest </br> (3) H2 DB Local & JPA </br> (4) `Apartment` <-> `Review` <-> `Reviewer`  </br> (5) `Apartment` <-> `School` </br> (6) `Apartment` <-> `Contract` <-> `Owner`  </br> (7) `Person` Inherence with `Owner` / `Reviewer` </br> (8) Implementing & Testing II </br> (9) Postman: testing assign features  </br> (10) **Error** control </br> </br>  - JPA: Cascade, fetch, `EAGER`/`LAZY`, etc  |  - [ApartmentPredictor: b12efcb4](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/b12efcb4e924d6198e732b1854faaba6c0cc2f37){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [ApartmentPredictor: 27054e39](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/27054e3974a634104259fca0fb551244478850de){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Postman: apartmentPredictorCRUD](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/7473960/2sBXVeFs8L#12cbfc18-54ab-406e-a6c0-620c12afc6a7){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [Spring Boot: JPA Inherence](https://albertprofe.dev/springboot/boot-concepts-jpa-5.html#table_per_class){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [JPA Relationships Guide](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA_Relationships_Guide.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [CACAJEC](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/appends/JPA_RelationshipsImplementation_Rule.md){.external target='_blank'} </br>   |
|   |    | | |
|   | 40 | 25/02/2026 |    - React: </br>  (1) intro: Describing the UI: `.jsx` and what is a component  </br> (2) Hooks: `useState` and `useEffect`: with who is syncing / dependencies & return clean-up <br> (3) maps & ES6 & Manage state & render cycle </br>  (4) Forms & SPA CRUD operations for Apartment: `react Hook form` </br> (5) decoupled version with `custom hook` > Context  </br></br>   - `useContext` </br>  - `useReducer` </br> - React JS App: router</br> - Material sideBar: **Drawer**   </br></br>  ++ ApartmentPredictor-React: nodes tree v2 </br> </br> ++ mathsWeb: </br> (1) MUI `Drawer` </br> (2) Theming: `sx` | - [React Principles](/reactjs/reactjs-what-principles.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Describing the UI](https://react.dev/learn/describing-the-ui){.external target='_blank'} </br>- [Adding Interactivity](https://react.dev/learn/adding-interactivity){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Managing state](https://react.dev/learn/managing-state){.external target='_blank'}    </br> </br>  - [React JS App: router](/reactjs/reactjs-app-router.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Material UI React Drawer](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-drawer/){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [ApartmentPredictor-React: 3a2560](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/47ce673a2560336bfd35b06c04038d458f4e01d4){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Codesandbox: Praga CRUD-1](https://codesandbox.io/p/devbox/react-dev-forked-cmrdn2){.external target='_blank'}   </br> - [Codesandbox: Praga CRUD-2 (telegram)](https://codesandbox.io/p/devbox/task-crud-forked-9dxyd5?workspaceId=ws_UM9jK6QFKQoLTL71feVrD1){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Codesandbox: Praga CRUD-3 (dynamic checkbox)](https://codesandbox.io/p/devbox/task-crud-2-forked-l72dzj?workspaceId=ws_UM9jK6QFKQoLTL71feVrD1){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Codesandbox: imageSize-context-1](https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/imagesize-context-hfktrt){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/ApartmentPredictor_v2.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br></br> - [mathsWeb: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/mathsWeb){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [mathsWeb: deployed](https://mathswebspace.netlify.app/){.external target='_blank'}  |
|   | 41 | 26/02/2026 |  - React: </br>  (1) intro: Describing the UI: `.jsx` and what is a component  </br> (2) Hooks: `useState` and `useEffect`: with who is syncing / dependencies & return clean-up <br> (3) maps & ES6 & Manage state & render cycle </br>  (4) Forms & SPA CRUD operations for Apartment: `react Hook form` </br> (5) decoupled version with `custom hook` > Context  </br>  (6) <s>**CRUD feature** (paint-compoments/reducer/api/context)</s> </br> (7) Project management versions: `ApartmentPredictor-React_index.md` </br></br>   - `useContext`: CRUD-Praga-5  </br>  - `useReducer`: CRUD-Praga-4  </br> </br> - Lab#02: React ThinkInReact    | - [React Principles](/reactjs/reactjs-what-principles.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Describing the UI](https://react.dev/learn/describing-the-ui){.external target='_blank'} </br>- [Adding Interactivity](https://react.dev/learn/adding-interactivity){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Managing state](https://react.dev/learn/managing-state){.external target='_blank'}    </br> </br> - [ApartmentPredictor-React: c794305](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/c79430592d9fac41e232fbf22ee8e597fd4d6e0a){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Codesandbox: Praga CRUD-4 (reducer)](https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/strange-http-wgyf3n){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Codesandbox: Praga CRUD-5 (context)](https://codesandbox.io/p/devbox/task-crud-4-forked-f75f4n?workspaceId=ws_UM9jK6QFKQoLTL71feVrD1){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [Lab#02: React ThinkInReact](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2302_React_ThinkInReact.md){.external target='_blank'}  |
: Backlog Sprint#11 February 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
